claims.text: The proposed pipeline uses large language models to iteratively generate, evaluate, and refine convolutional neural network architectures for image classification.
claims.source_quote: We propose a closed-loop pipeline leveraging large language models (LLMs) to iteratively generate, evaluate, and refine convolutional neural network architectures for image classification

claims.text: The pipeline operates on a single consumer-grade GPU without LLM fine-tuning.
claims.source_quote: on a single consumer-grade GPU without LLM fine-tuning

claims.text: The historical feedback memory uses a sliding window of K=5 recent improvement attempts.
claims.source_quote: a sliding window of $K{=}5$ recent improvement attempts keeps context size constant while providing sufficient signal for iterative learning

claims.text: The sliding window of K=5 keeps context size constant.
claims.source_quote: a sliding window of $K{=}5$ recent improvement attempts keeps context size constant while providing sufficient signal for iterative learning

claims.text: The historical feedback memory is inspired by Markov chains.
claims.source_quote: Central to our approach is a historical feedback memory inspired by Markov chains

claims.text: Each history entry is a structured diagnostic triple recording the identified problem, suggested modification, and resulting outcome.
claims.source_quote: each history entry is a structured diagnostic triple -- recording the identified problem, suggested modification, and resulting outcome

claims.text: The system treats code execution failures as first-class learning signals.
claims.source_quote: treating code execution failures as first-class learning signals

claims.text: Prior LLM optimizers discard failure trajectories.
claims.source_quote: Unlike prior LLM optimizers that discard failure trajectories

claims.text: The system uses a dual-LLM specialization with a Code Generator and a Prompt Improver.
claims.source_quote: A dual-LLM specialization reduces per-call cognitive load: a Code Generator produces executable PyTorch architectures while a Prompt Improver handles diagnostic reasoning

claims.text: The Code Generator produces executable PyTorch architectures.
claims.source_quote: a Code Generator produces executable PyTorch architectures

claims.text: The Prompt Improver handles diagnostic reasoning.
claims.source_quote: a Prompt Improver handles diagnostic reasoning

claims.text: The dual-LLM specialization reduces per-call cognitive load.
claims.source_quote: A dual-LLM specialization reduces per-call cognitive load

claims.text: Both the LLM and architecture training share limited VRAM.
claims.source_quote: Since both the LLM and architecture training share limited VRAM

claims.text: Sharing limited VRAM causes the search to implicitly favor compact, hardware-efficient models suited to edge deployment.
claims.source_quote: the search implicitly favors compact, hardware-efficient models suited to edge deployment

claims.text: Three frozen instruction-tuned LLMs with at most 7B parameters are evaluated.
claims.source_quote: We evaluate three frozen instruction-tuned LLMs ($\leq$7B parameters)

claims.text: The evaluation runs up to 2000 iterations.
claims.source_quote: across up to 2000 iterations

claims.text: The search uses an unconstrained open code space.
claims.source_quote: in an unconstrained open code space

claims.text: One-epoch proxy accuracy on CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, and ImageNette is used as a fast ranking signal.
claims.source_quote: using one-epoch proxy accuracy on CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, and ImageNette as a fast ranking signal

claims.text: On CIFAR-10, DeepSeek-Coder-6.7B improves accuracy from 28.2% to 69.2%.
claims.source_quote: On CIFAR-10, DeepSeek-Coder-6.7B improves from 28.2% to 69.2%

claims.text: On CIFAR-10, Qwen2.5-7B improves accuracy from 50.0% to 71.5%.
claims.source_quote: Qwen2.5-7B from 50.0% to 71.5%

claims.text: On CIFAR-10, GLM-5 improves accuracy from 43.2% to 62.0%.
claims.source_quote: and GLM-5 from 43.2% to 62.0%

claims.text: A full 2000-iteration search completes in approximately 18 GPU hours on a single RTX 4090.
claims.source_quote: A full 2000-iteration search completes in $\approx$18 GPU hours on a single RTX~4090

claims.text: Neural Architecture Search automates network design.
claims.source_quote: Neural Architecture Search (NAS) automates network design

claims.text: Conventional NAS methods demand substantial computational resources.
claims.source_quote: conventional methods demand substantial computational resources
